elements.name: Description
texts: A famous account of a 1398 visit by Viscount Ramon de Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory

elements.name: Source
texts: The Journey of Viscount Ramon de Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory, p. 6

elements.name: Contributor
texts: CELT: Corpus of Electronic Texts: a project of University College, Cork. Translated by Alan Mac an Bhaird.

elements.name: Rights
texts: Citation for the purposes of criticism

elements.name: Text
texts: "I left the court and went by daily stages until I entered a region called Chestershire, which is in the Welsh March, as far as the city of Chester, where I embarked and following the coast of Wales I came to a place called Holyhead; and from there I departed and crossed the deep with a fine wind in the direction of Ireland."

elements.name: Original Format
texts: The Journey of Viscount Ramon De Perellós to Saint Patrick's Purgatory. Alan Mac an Bhaird (ed), First edition [i + 23 pp] CELT Cork (2012)
